text.title: llamaindex-hybrid-retrieval Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-hybrid-retrieval with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: Rerank runs on 3 candidates and gives no signal
antipattern.root-cause: Pre-rerank pool too small — fusion_top_k=3 then rerank_top_n=3 is a no-op.
antipattern.fix: Set fusion_top_k=20-30, rerank_top_n=5; rerank needs a real candidate set.
antipattern.detector: Compare accuracy at fusion_top_k=5 vs 20; lift confirms.

antipattern.symptom: Latency jumps from 400ms to 2.5s after rerank wired in
antipattern.fix: Either host on GPU, or pick a small distilled cross-encoder (e.g., ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2).
antipattern.detector: Profile each stage; rerank should be <300ms.

antipattern.symptom: SimilarityPostprocessor drops every result on a niche query
antipattern.root-cause: Cutoff threshold set on a general benchmark; doesn't transfer.
antipattern.fix: Calibrate threshold on your eval set per-query-class; don't reuse external numbers.
antipattern.detector: Plot threshold vs recall@5 per class; pick at the elbow.

antipattern.symptom: QueryFusionRetriever opens too many concurrent LLM calls
antipattern.fix: Set num_workers=4 or wire an asyncio.Semaphore; mirror [[map-reduce-send-fanout]] rules.
antipattern.detector: Watch concurrent LLM count; should respect cap.
